content: We can reframe LLM agent working memory capacity limits as a feature, not a bug: the ICM curiosity mechanism can be rewired to actively prioritize encoding only high-novelty, high-reward state transitions into working memory, using working memory's inherent upper bound as a natural filter to prevent the agent from wandering into low-value trivial exploration.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
